channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok deal pulled after Trump tariff announcement
item.description: A finalized TikTok deal was pulled Thursday after President Trump announced massive new tariffs against China, a source familiar with the negotiations told The Hill. Trump was poised to sign an executive order approving a deal that would have seen TikTok’s U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft's AI division head wants to create a lasting relationship between chatbots and their users
item.description: Fifty years after the founding of Microsoft, the CEO of its artificial intelligence division has a big task: develop a new product line as integral to daily life as the software giant’s past innovations.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure
item.description: Researchers found the algorithms that rank pages in internet searches also can help planners understand how to prevent failures in electrical systems. The post How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Motorola’s new cheap phone offers great value for money – plus it feels like a canvas tote bag
item.description: Motorola has revealed the Edge 60 Fusion handset, which packs solid hardware into a colorful frame – with an option for a unique canvas-style finish.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: AI vs. pro gambler's $1 million March Madness bet coming down to Duke and Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The $1 million March Madness wager between a pro gambler and an artificial-intelligence site will be decided by the winner of the Duke-Houston game in the Final Four. The Vegas bookies project the gambler, who picked 5 1/2-point favorite Duke, should win.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Windows 11 is getting a very handy change to the taskbar, as Microsoft takes a leaf from Apple’s Mac playbook
item.description: Microsoft could be gunning for big changes to the Windows 11 desktop, as a nifty taskbar tweak emerges following rumored Start menu revamp.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump fires NSA director and deputy after Loomer meeting
item.description: The Trump administration has fired the director of the National Security Agency as well as his deputy, prompting outrage from congressional Democrats. Director Gen.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Increasingly dangerous scam targets kids through sextortion
item.description: The FBI issued a report that described sextortion as “a growing threat,” noting that the agency investigated roughly 1,000 cases a month for much of 2021 through early 2023.
item.dc:creator: Andre Mouchard, The Mercury News

item.title: Anthropic’s and OpenAI’s new AI education initiatives offer hope for enterprise knowledge retention
item.description: Two of the biggest names in artificial intelligence are independently developing new AI tools that encourage learning, at a time when the technology has been criticized for dumbing down smart users in the enterprise and discouraging critical thinking.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: CinemaCon 2025 teaser for The Fantastic Four: First Steps just confirmed a big fan theory about Sue Storm in the Marvel movie
item.description: A new sizzle reel for The Fantastic Four: First Steps sizzle reel confirms everyone's suspicions about a curious moment in its first trailer.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: High-tech canopy provides off-grid power and water
item.description: The EO Canopy is a self-sustaining, solar-powered camping platform designed to provide all the comforts of home while completely off the grid.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top 15 Microsoft Azure certifications to expedite your IT career
item.description: With companies increasingly moving their data to cloud, there’s an extensive need for more professionals with sound understanding and expertise of cloud technology. Microsoft’s cloud offering, Azure, ranks among the top in the industry.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: An OpenAI ‘open’ model shows how much the company—and AI—has changed in two years
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Leadership, trust, and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare
item.description: From ensuring the quality of data to fostering a culture of experimentation and adaptability, leaders must actively steer AI’s integration into operations. The post Leadership, trust, and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Tariff war throws building of data centers into disarray
item.description: Enterprise IT leaders are facing a double-whammy of uncertainties complicating their data center building decisions: The ever-changing realities of genAI strategies, and the back-and-forth nature of the current tariff wars pushed by the United States. “This is obviously a fluid situation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to accelerate digital transformation
item.description: Readers of CIO, Computerworld, CSO, InfoWorld, and Network World this week sought to learn how corporate culture can affect digital transformation, wanted to know more about the rise of cloud-based ERP, and had questions about desktop-based office software.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple feels gravity as the Trump tariff hammer falls
item.description: Apple’s leadership is no doubt scrambling to identify a silver lining (if there is one) as the storm of US President Donald J. Trump’s punishing range of global tariffs rains heavily across the company’s supply chain.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New Relic simplifies Kubernetes performance monitoring
item.description: New Relic this week announced a new capability in its Intelligent Observability Platform that the company says will enable engineering teams to deploy an eBPF-powered agent to automatically discover and monitor all applications running on Kubernetes clusters.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Accelerate cloud infrastructure initiatives with Lucid Software
item.description: Cloud and development operations (devops) teams are under constant pressure to do more, faster. They have outdated systems to update and manage, new systems to build, and requests from business units who need their support. It’s a velocity problem, and IT departments often struggle to keep pace.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Boost Agile team performance with scalable and flexible workflows with Lucid Software
item.description: Imagine one of your Agile teams is six months deep into a strategic digital initiative when they realize the solution isn’t working. Maybe it isn’t meeting customer requirements, or there is insufficient visibility into the project to specify where things are going off track.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta and UFC team up to bring AI and VR to fans
item.description: UFC is joining up with Facebook’s parent company Meta in a deal that will bring mixed martial arts to more fans around the world.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Analysts: Trump tariffs 'worse than the worst case scenario' for tech investors
item.description: Analysts described President Trump’s latest slate of tariffs Wednesday as “worse than the worst case scenario” for tech investors.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Judge blocks social media age-verification law in Arkansas
item.description: The Arkansas law would require people under 18 to only access certain sites with parental permission.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Emergency Chrome security update amid cyber espionage threats
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reports that researchers have uncovered a Chrome vulnerability used in a cyber espionage campaign.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Navy’s Justin Fanelli, Brandon Wehler and Matthew Rambo on unified endpoints
item.description: A new Navy initiative seeks best-of-breed solutions for more centralized endpoint management, the service technology experts share. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Navy’s Justin Fanelli, Brandon Wehler and Matthew Rambo on unified endpoints first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up
item.description: DoD’s former CXO shares details from the young office’s efforts to begin scaling customer experience across the department. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation
